home.title: Linear Algebra Fundamentals
home.subtitle: Interactive visualizations to understand matrix algebra
home.description: Master the mathematics behind PCA, SVD, and matrix factorizations through interactive p5.js visualizations. Click elements to see row/column vectors and step-by-step calculations.

ch1.title: Matrix Views
ch1.desc: 4 ways to look at a matrix: table, columns, rows, and elements

ch2.title: Vector Products
ch2.desc: Dot product and outer product — two fundamental ways to multiply vectors

ch3.title: Matrix × Vector
ch3.desc: Two perspectives: row-wise dot products vs column-wise linear combinations

ch4.title: Matrix × Matrix
ch4.desc: Four ways to understand matrix multiplication with interactive element-level exploration

ch5.title: Practical Patterns
ch5.desc: Diagonal scaling, eigenvalue patterns, and other useful tricks

ch6.title: Matrix Factorizations
ch6.desc: Five fundamental decompositions: CR, LU, QR, Eigendecomposition, and SVD

common.interactHint: Interact with the visualization to understand the concept

matrix_views.title: 4 Ways to View a Matrix
matrix_views.subtitle: A = [aᵢⱼ] can be seen in four equivalent perspectives

vector_products.title: Vector × Vector
vector_products.desc: Two ways: dot product (scalar) and outer product (matrix)

matrix_vector.title: Matrix × Vector
matrix_vector.desc: Mv as row-wise dot products OR column-wise linear combination
matrix_vector.clickElement: Click an element of Mv to see its computation

matrix_matrix.title: Matrix × Matrix
matrix_matrix.desc: C = AB: Click any C[i,j] to see C[i,j] = Σₖ A[i,k]·B[k,j]
matrix_matrix.clickToCompute: Click to compute step by step

eigendecomp.title: Eigendecomposition
eigendecomp.desc: A = QΛQᵀ: Power iteration finds eigenvectors

factorizations.title: Matrix Factorizations
factorizations.desc: Five ways to break down a matrix
